scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix frontend && python3 -m venv backend/venv && backend/venv/bin/pip install -r backend/requirements.txt
scripts.dev: npm run dev:backend & npm run dev:frontend
scripts.seed:backend: backend/venv/bin/python backend/manage.py migrate && backend/venv/bin/python backend/manage.py seed_db && backend/venv/bin/python backend/manage.py run_pipeline
